testcase.name: verifyInputFunctionality

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Enter first & last name'], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@placeholder='Enter first & last name']"}.
